name: Summertime's Bounty Pie
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Sour Cream or Plain Yogurt
3 and a half cups Hot Cooked Assorted Veggies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
In a large bowl, combine the vegetable soup mix, ground beef, bread crumbs, sour cream or yogurt, egg, and thyme or basil.
Sprinkle flour into a 9-inch pie pan. Press the ground beef mixture onto the bottom and sides of the prepared pan, shaping edges about three-quarters inch above the pan and forming a center well.
Bake for 40 minutes. Drain as needed.
Fill with shredded cheese, then vegetables and remaining cheese. Bake an additional 10 minutes or until the cheese is melted.
Microwave Directions:
In a 9-inch glass pie plate, prepare the ground beef mixture as above. Heat uncovered at HIGH (Full Power) for 9 minutes, turning the plate every 3 minutes.
Fill with shredded cheese, vegetables, and remaining cheese. Heat uncovered for an additional 3 minutes or until the cheese is melted. Let stand covered for 5 minutes before serving.
